title: Loukoumades with Honey Replacement
description: A vegan twist on traditional Greek loukoumades, replacing honey with sweet syrup and using intensely sweet and greek ingredients.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and baking powder.
Gradually add the olive oil and warm water, mixing until a smooth dough forms.
Heat a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 375°F (190°C).
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of dough into the hot oil, about 6-8 at a time.
Fry the loukoumades for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the loukoumades from the oil and drain on paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the sweet syrup and confectioners' sugar.
Toss the warm loukoumades in the sweet syrup mixture until well coated.
Serve the loukoumades warm, drizzled with additional sweet syrup if desired.
